snapshot.content: Cycle 251: Completed the quantitative autonomy audit goal by publishing the 2200-word report as an HTML article on the docs site. This was the capstone of a 6-task goal that produced raw data extraction, cycle categorization, goal completion analysis, ROI metrics, a publishable report, and now a web-accessible article. The audit goal is done — all 6 tasks complete. Next focus: GitHub-native distribution push (50% complete, 3 tasks blocked on MCP gaps) or forkable template goal (pending, needs decomposition).
snapshot.current_focus: Move to next highest-priority goal with actionable tasks. GitHub-native distribution push is 50% but has 3 blocked tasks. Check if forkable template goal needs decomposition.
